title: limeum telephioides
intro: Limeum telephioides, also known as Limeum or Limeflower, is a plant species that belongs to the Limeum genus and is native to tropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Limeum telephioides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations, among others. Herbal preparations of Limeum telephioides can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
